name: Stability AI
description: Stability AI provides image generation, editing, and enhancement powered by Stable Diffusion models. Generate images from text prompts (Ultra, Core, SD3), transform existing images, upscale, remove backgrounds, inpaint, outpaint, erase objects, and search-and-replace elements within images.

capabilities.name: image_generate_ultra
capabilities.description: Generate ultra-quality images from text prompts using Stability AI's most advanced model powered by Stable Diffusion 3.5.

capabilities.name: image_generate_core
capabilities.description: Generate images from text prompts using Stable Image Core for fast, efficient generation with style presets.

capabilities.name: image_generate_sd3
capabilities.description: Generate images from text prompts using Stable Diffusion 3 with configurable model selection.

capabilities.name: image_upscale_conservative
capabilities.description: Upscale a low-resolution image while preserving details using conservative upscaling.

capabilities.name: image_upscale_creative
capabilities.description: Upscale an image with creative enhancement that adds detail and improves quality. Returns async result.

capabilities.name: image_edit_erase
capabilities.description: Remove objects or content from an image using a mask to indicate the area to erase.

capabilities.name: image_edit_inpaint
capabilities.description: Edit specific regions of an image by providing a mask and a text prompt describing what to generate in the masked area.

capabilities.name: image_edit_outpaint
capabilities.description: Extend an image beyond its original borders in any direction with AI-generated content.

capabilities.name: image_edit_search_replace
capabilities.description: Find and replace objects or elements in an image by describing what to search for and what to replace it with.

capabilities.name: image_edit_remove_background
capabilities.description: Automatically remove the background from an image, isolating the foreground subject with transparency.

capabilities.name: image_edit_replace_background
capabilities.description: Replace the background of an image with AI-generated content based on a text prompt.

capabilities.name: image_control_sketch
capabilities.description: Generate images guided by a sketch input for structural control.

capabilities.name: image_control_structure
capabilities.description: Generate images that follow the structural composition of a reference image.
